arts.ttl: Aston Villa star Emi Martinez repeats France jibe with subtle World Cup message
arts.sum: Emi Martínez appears to be embracing his role as ‘public enemy number one’ in France ahead of Aston Villa’s Champions League quarter-final clash with Paris Saint-Germain. “He is mature,” Emery said when asked about the cap.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star reveals the real secret to Marco Asensio's success
arts.sum: Asked if Asensio’s work rate is an underrated part of his game, Tielemans said: “Probably, because when you look at him, you don’t think he is a hard worker in that sense where he is more so a ball-player. Marco Asensio will face his parent club in the Champions League on Wednesday night (8pm)

arts.ttl: Emiliano Martinez sends French fans a message as Aston Villa arrive in Paris
arts.sum: The Argentina goalkeeper wore a hat celebrating Argentina’s success while covering up a French cockerel emblem.

arts.ttl: 'I suggest Simon Jordan goes to see Aston Villa play after poor Marcus Rashford comment'
arts.sum: Simon Jordan has been slammed for saying signing Marcus Rashford would be too 'big a deal' for Aston Villa in the summer. 'I suggest Simon Jordan goes to see Aston Villa play after poor Marcus Rashford comment'

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain starlet reacts to Lamine Yamal comparisons
arts.sum: Last summer, Barcelona opted to sign Dani Olmo, and in the process, they turned down the chance to sign a now-PSG star that is generating a lot of conversations in France after a fine debut season at the Ligue 1 champions. arts.ttl: Aston Villa must believe against PSG - but I don't like Emiliano Martinez's attitude - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Frank Leboeuf has been critical of Emiliano Martinez but believes he can play a significant role in Wednesday's Champions League clash between Paris Saint-Germain and Aston Villa (8pm kick-off). Aston Villa must believe against PSG - but I don't like Emiliano Martinez's attitude

arts.ttl: Man Utd Ready for Major Transfer Decision on Chelsea, PSG Target Seeking £9.4M Annual Wages
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been tracking Victor Osimhen for a while, and with the summer transfer window approaching, speculation about his future is intensifying. Currently at Galatasaray, the Nigerian striker has regained the form that made him one of the standout players of the 2022-23 season. arts.ttl: Liverpool Must Meet Monumental Wage Demands to Keep PSG, Real Madrid Target
arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar now on loan at Fenerbahce, Paris Saint-Germain could be in the market for a new center-back this summer.
